business.name: ASN Handyman Services
business.tagline: Every job done right, every time

hero.headline: The fix you need, *when you need it*
hero.subheadline: Virginia Beach handyman who shows up ready to work. No job too small, no problem too weird.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From quick fixes to full repairs
services_section.subheading: We handle the stuff that's been on your to-do list for months

services.title: Home Repairs & Maintenance
services.description: Leaky faucets, squeaky doors, loose railings — the everyday stuff that drives you crazy until it's fixed.

services.title: Fixture Installation
services.description: Ceiling fans, light fixtures, towel bars, and anything else that needs mounting to your walls or ceiling.

services.title: Drywall & Touch-ups
services.description: Patch holes, fix cracks, and make your walls look like nothing ever happened.

services.title: General Carpentry
services.description: Custom shelving, trim work, cabinet repairs, and wood projects that require steady hands and sharp tools.

about.heading: Built on honest work and fair prices
about.body: ASN Handyman Services has been keeping Virginia Beach homes in top shape with reliable repairs and honest pricing. We believe every job deserves the same attention to detail, whether it's a five-minute fix or a full-day project. Your satisfaction is our reputation.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Virginia Beach and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to cross something off your list?
cta.body: Get your free estimate today. No hidden fees, no surprises — just honest work at fair prices.
